calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Hui Xian Zhang, petitioner in pro per.
Helen Ruan, friend to Ms. Zhang, assisting her with translation.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition to Establish Fact of Death.

Ms. Zhang reported that her son Adam Li went missing in 2016 when he was 25 years old, that a police report was filed shortly after his disappearance, and that follow-up was conducted without any further information being obtained. The Court noted the petitioner's report that there had been no contact or financial activity since his disappearance and that the last known phone signal was near Ocean Beach.

The Court took the matter under submission and indicated its intent to grant the petition, finding September 15, 2016, as the presumed date of death.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
